heading: Interface Endpoints
body:
To return the AWS (Amazon Web Services) private endpoint interface that you specify. using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints aws interfaces describe <interfaceEndpointId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas privateEndpoints aws interfaces describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-aws-interfaces-describe).

Atlas UI

Click Dedicated Cluster for a private endpoint
for your dedicated Atlas cluster. (default)

Azure Private Link

Atlas CLI
